title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXI. Natural History.
content:
Charley Warley had a cow.
        Black and white about the brow;
        Open the gate and let her go through,
        Charley Warley's old cow!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXI. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
